bell_warden.core_lesson: learn Guard, Break, and safe punishment windows
bell_warden.phase_1: slow bell swings, guard-heavy body, simple punish windows
bell_warden.phase_2: faster multi-hit toll chains and larger scorch pressure
bell_warden.break_window: after the full toll chain or after a clean parry on the final hit
bell_warden.desperation_below_35_percent: burns its own guard to gain damage and acts more aggressively

flood_archivist.core_lesson: swap around affinity changes and manage Soak safely
flood_archivist.phase_1: casts tide spells and archives player weaknesses
flood_archivist.phase_2: rotates its active affinity and rewrites matchup rules each cycle
flood_archivist.desperation_below_35_percent: floods the field with Soak and alternates tide/spark burst turns

glass_hound_matriarch.core_lesson: protect the backline, react to adds, and punish leap timings
glass_hound_matriarch.phase_1: fast pounces, pack marks, and single-target pressure
glass_hound_matriarch.phase_2: summons glass_hound adds and gains extra turns if an exposed ally falls
glass_hound_matriarch.break_window: after a parried leap or after both adds are removed
glass_hound_matriarch.desperation_below_35_percent: chain-pounces every other turn and ignores taunt once

quiet_magistrate.core_lesson: vary postures and avoid repeating the same patterns
quiet_magistrate.phase_1: reads repeated skill use and punishes predictable posture loops
quiet_magistrate.phase_2: silences one posture each cycle and rewards flexible play
quiet_magistrate.break_window: after the party uses 3 different postures within 2 rounds
quiet_magistrate.desperation_below_35_percent: locks the last repeated pattern and gains huge damage against it
